name: 17q23_2_TBX2_TBX4_SD
description: 17q23.1-q23.2 SD blocks flanking TBX2 and TBX4. Direct-orientation SD pair mediates recurrent ~2.2 Mb 17q23.1-q23.2 microdeletion/microduplication, encompassing TBX2, TBX4 (small patella / ischiocoxopodopatellar syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~30-50 kb at ~98% identity; core contains TBX2, TBX4, BRIP1, MED13.
